name: Procore
description: A construction and project coordination platform used to manage documents, RFIs, site activity, defects, and progress across fitout or capital works.
whyUseIt: When a property manager is involved in fitouts, capital works, or landlord-delivered projects, Procore helps keep project information visible and reduces the chaos of email-driven delivery.
aiCapabilities: AI can summarize meeting notes, flag overdue RFIs, and highlight project risks emerging from issue logs and documentation delays.
workflowStage: Fitout coordination, project delivery, and defect closeout
propertyManagerWorkflow: Property managers use Procore to stay close to project progress, monitor handover quality, and make sure site works do not drift away from operational requirements.
managerExpects: Current information, disciplined issue tracking, and smooth handover records that help the building return to normal operations cleanly.
aiWorkflowImpact: AI can reduce admin load around meeting recaps and help project risks surface earlier through pattern spotting.
demoDescription: Review a fitout status log, identify the open items that could delay tenant handover, and decide which ones need same-week escalation.

vocabulary.definition: A request for information used to clarify design, scope, or construction questions.
A record of incomplete or unsatisfactory items requiring correction before closeout.
The transition point where project delivery is completed and responsibility moves into operational management.

beginnerMistakes: Watching the project passively instead of tracking the operational risks to handover
Ignoring documentation quality until closeout week
Failing to connect project issues back to tenant or building-service impacts
